2606.31048.title: Knowledge Distillation from Large Reasoning Models to Compact Student Models: A Case Study on the John O Bryan Mathematics Competition
2606.31048.paper_summary: This paper investigates knowledge distillation from a large reasoning model (DeepSeek-R1) to a compact student model (Qwen2.5-7B). Using historical problems from the John O'Bryan Mathematics Competition at Northern Kentucky University (2011-2025), we build a Chain-of-Thought (CoT) training corpus through a dual-agent framework. The dataset is used to fine-tune the student model with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) on Apple Silicon hardware using the MLX framework. The base Qwen2.5-7B model achieves 64.67% accuracy on competition problems, while the DeepSeek-R1 teacher achieves 91.40%. An initial 1,000-iteration training run revealed severe overfitting, with validation loss reaching a minimum at iteration 200 before rising steadily. Based on this finding, we ran five independent training runs each limited to 200 iterations with varied random seeds to assess result stability. Across these five runs, the fine-tuned student model achieves a mean accuracy of 69.43% (std dev 0.17%) on the competition dataset, a 4.76 percentage-point improvement over the base model, and generalizes to 73.1% (std dev 0.18%) on the MATH-500 benchmark. We further study how response length affects answer quality across six reasoning levels (R1-R6): accuracy declines consistently from 69.43% at R1 (mean 220 words) to 41.9% at R6 (mean 31.2 words), with the two-person speed section most sensitive to token reduction. These results demonstrate that CoT distillation improves compact student models and that response length is a critical factor in mathematical reasoning quality.
2606.31048.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文探討了從大型推理模型（DeepSeek-R1）到緊湊學生模型（Qwen2.5-7B）的知識蒸餾。<lb/>使用來自北肯塔基大學約翰·奧布萊恩數學競賽（2011-2025）的歷史問題，我們通過雙代理框架構建了一個思維鏈（CoT）訓練語料庫。<lb/>該數據集用於在Apple Silicon硬體上使用MLX框架對學生模型進行低秩適應（LoRA）的微調。<lb/>基礎的Qwen2.5-7B模型在競賽問題上達到了64.67%的準確率，而DeepSeek-R1教師模型則達到了91.40%。<lb/>一次初步的1,000次迭代訓練運行顯示出嚴重的過擬合，驗證損失在第200次迭代時達到最低點後穩步上升。<lb/>根據這一發現，我們進行了五次獨立的訓練運行，每次限制在200次迭代，並使用不同的隨機種子來評估結果的穩定性。<lb/>在這五次運行中，微調後的學生模型在競賽數據集上達到了69.43%的平均準確率（標準差0.17%），比基礎模型提高了4.76個百分點，並在MATH-500基準上推廣到73.1%（標準差0.18%）。<lb/>我們進一步研究了回應長度如何影響六個推理層級（R1-R6）中的答案質量：準確率從R1的69.43%（平均220個單詞）穩步下降到R6的41.9%（平均31.2個單詞），其中雙人速度部分對標記減少最為敏感。<lb/>這些結果表明，CoT蒸餾改善了緊湊學生模型，並且回應長度是數學推理質量的一個關鍵因素。
2606.31048.author: Gaurab Baral et.al.
2606.31048.authors: Gaurab Baral, Aaditya Khanal, Yangyang Tao, Junxiu Zhou
